epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: ICHD-3 criteria with structured headache assessment; neurology pathways common

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with access to oxygen, triptans, and preventive therapy; varies by member state

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Specialist headache clinics available in many countries
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: High-flow oxygen and triptans acutely; verapamil prevention; CGRP options in selected refractory cases in some systems
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Access variability and wait times for specialist headache clinics
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Evidence-based acute and preventive therapies widely available in many systems
